hookCapture.patchTarget: Parse-postfix (OK: Command.Parse, OK: Command.Parse, OK: CommandLineParser.Parse, OK: CommandLineParser.Parse, OK: ParseResult.Invoke, OK: ParseErrorAction.Invoke, OK: HelpAction.Invoke, OK: ParseResult.InvokeAsync, OK: RootCommand.ctor(String))

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: Purges the specified solution or project.

options.name: --recurse
options.description: Find projects in sub-directories and purge those too. [default: False]

options.name: --no-clean
options.description: Don't run `dotnet clean` before deleting the output directories. [default: False]

options.name: --vs
options.description: Delete temporary files & directories created by Visual Studio, e.g. .vs, *.csproj.user. [default: False]

options.name: --dry-run
options.description: Show what would be deleted without actually deleting anything. [default: False]

arguments.name: TARGET
arguments.description: The path of the solution or project to purge. If not specified, the current directory will be used.
